'''Palandrix Personal Protection Gear''' was a small company that produced melee weapons and armor. Palandrix products included [[Stun baton/Legends|stun batons]], [[stun gauntlet]]s, [[Sonic stunner/Legends|sonic stunners]], [[G-20 Glop grenade/Legends|glop grenades]] and the [[power cane]].
